name: hazina-escrow
description: Hazina Data Escrow — Web3 data marketplace on Stellar

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
